_comment: Species: Spirit Rat (灵鼠) from A Will Eternal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Rat

canonical.appearance: Rat 0.5 m, fur spirit-gold, can sense spirit-treasures for li
canonical.size: 0.5 m adult, 5 jin; ancient 2 m, 200 jin
canonical.behavior: Treasure-seeking companion beast; cultivates by hoarding spirit-treasures
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_rat — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
